text:
## Weekly Update - 2026-04-19

Hey <@&1424461167883194418>. 29 PRs merged this week. We moved a bunch of models around to make them faster, shipped a CLI, and the app showcase is officially overflowing.

💻 **The terminal is the new frontend**
* Cut v0.1.0 of the new `polli` CLI. It's polished, has a video demo skill, and saves you from writing raw curl commands when you just want to test something quickly.

🏎️ **Inference speedruns & reasoning flags**
* Migrated Kimi, Deepseek, GLM, Qwen-large, and Minimax to Fireworks AI. Sana Sprint 1.6B is now running on GH200s. Things should feel snappier.
* Added a `reasoning` flag for Gemini image models.
* Veo 3.1 fast model ID updated to the GA version.

🔧 **Browser SDKs & power user plumbing**
* Reflected CORS request headers — OpenAI SDKs will now work directly from your browser without complaining.
* Fixed `enter` usage exports for power users.
* Expired API keys are now hidden from the dashboard. Less clutter.

🌸 **The greenhouse is overflowing**
* You all shipped a lot. Added Neon Runner, Flashlearn, Ciel AI, DREAMMELD, StyleOps, Overtli Studio Suite, and about 10 others to the showcase. Keep building.
